activeIndex.description: Zero-based index of the currently active step.

onChange.description: Called when the user activates a dot (only when interactive=true).

variant.description: Visual style. 'dot' grows the active dot into a pill, 'bar' uses horizontal bars, 'pill' fills completed/active dots, 'numbered' shows step numbers.

color.description: Override color for the active dot.

showLabels.description: Add visually-hidden labels for screen readers (always on for numbered variant via aria-label).

labelFormatter.description: Custom label formatter for each dot's accessible name.

className.description: Additional CSS class for the wrapper.
